name: Lumexa Imaging Holdings, Inc.
business: Lumexa Imaging Holdings, Inc. is one of the largest national providers of diagnostic imaging services. Its primary source of income is fees paid by patients, insurance companies, or other payors for imaging studies and radiologist interpretations. It also earns revenue from managing centers for health system joint ventures and providing radiology and administrative support to third-party hospitals.

exposures.sentence: We are one of the largest national providers of diagnostic imaging services.
We intend to continue investing in these technologies and believe that using third-party AI allows us to benefit from the most advanced solutions in the market.

catalysts.event: ERP and other IT implementations continue
catalysts.sentence: We expect that some of these activities, including our ERP and other IT implementations, as well as executive recruiting, will continue through part of 2026.
